Bash(node -e "const { neon } = require\('@neondatabase/serverless'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\({ path: '.env.local' }\); const sql = neon\(process.env.DATABASE_URL\); sql\\`SELECT id, nom_prenom, partie FROM dossiers ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5\\`.then\(r => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r, null, 2\)\)\);")

Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "import\('@neondatabase/serverless'\).then\(async \({ neon }\) => { const sql = neon\(process.env.DATABASE_URL\); const r1 = await sql\\`SELECT type_bien, COUNT\(*\)::int AS n FROM dossiers GROUP BY type_bien ORDER BY n DESC\\`; console.log\('dossiers.type_bien:'\); console.table\(r1\); const r2 = await sql\\`SELECT type_bien, COUNT\(*\)::int AS n FROM kyc_responses GROUP BY type_bien ORDER BY n DESC\\`; console.log\('kyc_responses.type_bien:'\); console.table\(r2\); }\);")
